name: chr19_19p13_2_KISS1R_SD
description: 19p13.2 region surrounding KISS1R (GPR54), the kisspeptin receptor central to pubertal onset. The locus is flanked by short SD blocks shared with other 19p loci and lies in a broader SD-dense neighborhood including SMARCA4 and CACNA1A.

architecture.internal_structure: Several 2-10 kb intra-chromosomal duplicons at 94-98% identity flanking KISS1R, ARID3A, WDR18; embedded in 19p subtelomeric SD field.
